title: AI_OS Packet Approval Metadata
description: Foundation schema stub for approval metadata attached to a packet or approval inbox item.

schema.description: Identifies this object as AI_OS packet approval metadata.

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this approval schema contract.

approval_id.description: Approval request identifier when an approval has been requested.

required.description: Whether human approval is required before the next gated action.

state.description: Approval state, such as NOT_REQUESTED, PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, EXPIRED, or BLOCKED.

required_for.description: Actions requiring approval, such as APPLY, COMMIT, PUSH, PROTECTED_PATH, or LOCK_RELEASE.
